pages.text: The $(item)Woodland Mansion Skyseed$() — $(item)dark oak planks$() and $(item)diamonds$() around a $(item)Totem of Undying$(). A two-storey dark-oak manor of vindicators and an evoker.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.

A grand $(o)dark-oak manor$() two storeys tall, raised on a large grassy island ringed with dark oaks. A red-carpet hall, a staircase up to the loot rooms and library, glass windows, and a tall gabled roof — the headline overworld build.

$(bold)The garrison$()$(br)An $(item)evoker$() and a pack of $(item)vindicators$() hold the hall. The evoker is the prize: kill it for a $(item)Totem of Undying$(). The mansion is a $(o)reliable totem destination$() — throw another seed whenever you want more.
$(bold)Loot$()$(br)Three chests on the vanilla $(item)woodland mansion$() table are scattered through the rooms — enchanted books, gear, and the odd treasure.

$(bold)Crafting$()$(br)$(item)Dark oak planks$() and $(item)diamonds$() around a single $(item)Totem of Undying$(). Your first totem comes from an $(o)Evoker Cell$() (rarely on a dark-forest Forest island); after that the mansion farms its own.
